title: loranthus luteus
intro: Loranthus luteus, also known as the yellow mistletoe, is a species of hemiparasitic plant that grows on the branches of various host trees, obtaining its nutrients through a connection with the host's vascular system. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Loranthus luteus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. Loranthus luteus can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
